'''âf-f-d-y''' ('''kafafdeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chasten|chasten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chasten|chasten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-f-d-y
|-
! Lemma
| kafafdeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifafdeyoko|thifafdeyoko]] || [[word:jifafdeyoko|jifafdeyoko]] || [[word:shifafdeyoko|shifafdeyoko]] || [[word:kifafdeyoko|kifafdeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufafdeyoko|thuthufafdeyoko]] || [[word:jujufafdeyoko|jujufafdeyoko]] || [[word:shushufafdeyoko|shushufafdeyoko]] || [[word:kukufafdeyoko|kukufafdeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufafdeyoko|thufafdeyoko]] || [[word:jufafdeyoko|jufafdeyoko]] || [[word:shufafdeyoko|shufafdeyoko]] || [[word:kufafdeyoko|kufafdeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofafdeyoko|thofafdeyoko]] || [[word:jofafdeyoko|jofafdeyoko]] || [[word:shofafdeyoko|shofafdeyoko]] || [[word:kofafdeyoko|kofafdeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfafdeyoko|thĂŠfafdeyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfafdeyoko|jĂŠfafdeyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfafdeyoko|shĂŠfafdeyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfafdeyoko|kĂŠfafdeyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafafdeyoko|thafafdeyoko]] || [[word:jafafdeyoko|jafafdeyoko]] || [[word:shafafdeyoko|shafafdeyoko]] || [[word:kafafdeyoko|kafafdeyoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
